mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat( chatno, memberno, dogno, question, answer, rdate ) VALUES( chat_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{dogno}, #{question}, #{answer}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT chatno, memberno, dogno, question, answer, rdate FROM chat WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY chatno DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10
